news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings starts commercial production of 8000 Ton press line, adding 40,000 Tonnes PA forging capacity.
Total forging capacity reaches 311,400 Tonnes PA with Rs. 80 Cr investment via debt and internal accruals.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings starts commercial production of 8000 Ton press line, adding 40,000 Tonnes PA forging capacity.
Total forging capacity reaches 311,400 Tonnes PA with Rs. 80 Cr investment via debt and internal accruals.

news.title:
NCLT Kolkata approved the amalgamation of Mal Metalliks, Multitech Auto with Ramkrishna Casting Solutions, subsidiaries of Ramkrishna Forgings.
The merger aims to streamline operations, optimize resources, enhance efficiency, and strengthen financial structure post-approval.
news.summary:
NCLT Kolkata approved the amalgamation of Mal Metalliks, Multitech Auto with Ramkrishna Casting Solutions, subsidiaries of Ramkrishna Forgings.
The merger aims to streamline operations, optimize resources, enhance efficiency, and strengthen financial structure post-approval.

news.title:
India plans to expand Vande Bharat fleet to 4,500 trainsets by 2047, benefiting stocks like BEML, BHEL, Titagarh Rail, Ramkrishna Forgings, and RVNL.
These companies, involved in manufacturing, supply chain, and maintenance, are poised for revenue growth due to the ambitious rail modernization drive.
news.summary:
India plans to expand Vande Bharat fleet to 4,500 trainsets by 2047, benefiting stocks like BEML, BHEL, Titagarh Rail, Ramkrishna Forgings, and RVNL.
These companies, involved in manufacturing, supply chain, and maintenance, are poised for revenue growth due to the ambitious rail modernization drive.

news.title:
US tariff relief could boost Indian engineering and auto exports, says Ramkrishna Forgings MD.
Bajaj Auto sees potential production shift to India with supportive tariff changes enhancing US exports.
news.summary:
US tariff relief could boost Indian engineering and auto exports, says Ramkrishna Forgings MD.
Bajaj Auto sees potential production shift to India with supportive tariff changes enhancing US exports.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings targets 10-15% annual sales growth through FY27 and beyond.
The firm plans to cut debt below INR 1,900 Cr by FY26, reducing INR 350 Cr in Q3.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings targets 10-15% annual sales growth through FY27 and beyond.
The firm plans to cut debt below INR 1,900 Cr by FY26, reducing INR 350 Cr in Q3.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings hosted its Q3 & 9M FY26 earnings call on Jan 27, 2026.
The audio link of the call is available on the company's website for investor access.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings hosted its Q3 & 9M FY26 earnings call on Jan 27, 2026.
The audio link of the call is available on the company's website for investor access.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings plans to boost growth with new aluminum forgings and facilities.
It includes a 45,000 MT castings plant, 40,000 MT forging capacity, and railway bogie assemblies by Q4 FY26.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings plans to boost growth with new aluminum forgings and facilities.
It includes a 45,000 MT castings plant, 40,000 MT forging capacity, and railway bogie assemblies by Q4 FY26.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹1.63B from ₹1.26B YoY, showing growth.
EBITDA margin improved to 14.9% from 11.8% YoY, highlighting profitability gains.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹1.63B from ₹1.26B YoY, showing growth.
EBITDA margin improved to 14.9% from 11.8% YoY, highlighting profitability gains.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings' new aluminium forging facility began production on 20 Jan 2026.
The Rs. 57.5 crore facility with 3,000-tonne capacity targets aluminium and EV markets.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings' new aluminium forging facility began production on 20 Jan 2026.
The Rs. 57.5 crore facility with 3,000-tonne capacity targets aluminium and EV markets.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd schedules a Board Meeting on 27 Jan 2026 to review Q3 & 9M FY 2025-26 financial results.
Trading window remains closed for designated persons until 48 hours post-result declaration as per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd schedules a Board Meeting on 27 Jan 2026 to review Q3 & 9M FY 2025-26 financial results.
Trading window remains closed for designated persons until 48 hours post-result declaration as per SEBI norms.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings allocated 34 lakh warrants to promoter Chaitanya Jalan at ₹588 each, totaling ₹199.9 crore.
These warrants are convertible into equity shares within 18 months.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings allocated 34 lakh warrants to promoter Chaitanya Jalan at ₹588 each, totaling ₹199.9 crore.
These warrants are convertible into equity shares within 18 months.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings plans to issue 34M warrants, raising promoter holding to 44.5%.
Funds will repay ₹150 crore debt and ₹50 crore for corporate purposes; reclassification ongoing.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings plans to issue 34M warrants, raising promoter holding to 44.5%.
Funds will repay ₹150 crore debt and ₹50 crore for corporate purposes; reclassification ongoing.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings disclosed updates under SEBI's Regulation 30, including revisions in EGM notice points.
Promoter Riddhi Portfolio's stake will rise post-warrant conversion; Rs 199.9 Cr proceeds for debt repayment and corporate purposes.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings disclosed updates under SEBI's Regulation 30, including revisions in EGM notice points.
Promoter Riddhi Portfolio's stake will rise post-warrant conversion; Rs 199.9 Cr proceeds for debt repayment and corporate purposes.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirmed Ramkrishna Forgings' long-term rating at Crisil AA- Negative.
Short-term rating remains at Crisil A1; watch status resolved due to improved controls.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirmed Ramkrishna Forgings' long-term rating at Crisil AA- Negative.
Short-term rating remains at Crisil A1; watch status resolved due to improved controls.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd held its EGM on 12 Dec 2025 via VC, attended by 55 members.
A special resolution to issue 34,00,000 convertible warrants to the promoter was passed.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd held its EGM on 12 Dec 2025 via VC, attended by 55 members.
A special resolution to issue 34,00,000 convertible warrants to the promoter was passed.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings seeks shareholder reclassification from promoter group to public.
Application submitted to BSE, NSE on 17 Nov 2025; details on company website.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings seeks shareholder reclassification from promoter group to public.
Application submitted to BSE, NSE on 17 Nov 2025; details on company website.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd announces EGM on 12 Dec 2025 via VC to discuss issuance of 34 lakh convertible warrants.
The warrants, priced at INR 588, will raise INR 199.9 crore and be allotted to promoter Chaitanya Jalan.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd announces EGM on 12 Dec 2025 via VC to discuss issuance of 34 lakh convertible warrants.
The warrants, priced at INR 588, will raise INR 199.9 crore and be allotted to promoter Chaitanya Jalan.

news.title: Ramkrishna Forgings approves issuance of warrants worth up to ₹2 billion.
news.summary: Ramkrishna Forgings approves issuance of warrants worth up to ₹2 billion.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings posted Rs 908 crore revenue in Q2 FY26, showing resilience amid global volatility.
Secured contracts worth Rs 1116 crore; domestic sales grew, exports faced short-term decline.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings posted Rs 908 crore revenue in Q2 FY26, showing resilience amid global volatility.
Secured contracts worth Rs 1116 crore; domestic sales grew, exports faced short-term decline.

news.title:
Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd will host an earnings call for Q2 FY26 results on 12 Nov 2025 at 6 PM IST.
The call will discuss business strategy and outlook with key management participation, accessible via provided details.
news.summary:
Ramkrishna Forgings Ltd will host an earnings call for Q2 FY26 results on 12 Nov 2025 at 6 PM IST.
The call will discuss business strategy and outlook with key management participation, accessible via provided details.
